# Dhanam

Compact LLM context index for this repository.

## Read first

- `AGENTS.md` — canonical agent operating instructions.
- `README.md` — human/product overview when present.
- `docs/README.md` — canonical documentation map.
- `docs/GA_REMEDIATION_ROADMAP.md` — full GA program (stability + commercial +
  consumer); canonical implementation plan.
- `docs/COMMERCIAL_GA_EXECUTION.md` — G2 commercial GA runbook (WS1–WS6) and
  staging commercial smoke configuration.
- `docs/ROADMAP.md` — stability priorities P0–P8 and milestones M1–M7.
- `docs/STABILITY_AUDIT_2026-05-19.md` — current stability, production,
  staging, DNS, health, and Enclii rollout status.
- `docs/STABILITY_WRAP_UP_2026-05-20.md` — concise latest stability wrap-up,
  verification state, blockers, and next order of work.
- `docs/TECH_DEBT.md` — current active technical debt and historical debt
  archive pointers.
- `docs/DOCUMENTATION_AUDIT_2026-05-22.md` — latest documentation corpus audit.
- `docs/runbooks/BREAK_GLASS.md` — break-glass procedures when Enclii adapters are missing.
- `docs/api/README.md` — OpenAPI export and API reference index.
- `ECOSYSTEM.md` — MADFAM ecosystem and Enclii deployment context when present.
- `llms-full.txt` — full context map and durable operating contract.
- `tools/agent-manifest.json` — machine-readable repo metadata.

## Production operations

Routine production operations are Enclii-first. Use Enclii web, API, or CLI
before raw infrastructure tools. Direct `kubectl`, `helm`, SSH, provider CLIs,
`docker exec`, or direct container access is bootstrap/break-glass only.
